blocks.text: Derby Day, Title Races, and Hovland Chasing the Valspar Lead

A blockbuster Saturday unfolds across golf, football, and tennis. Premier League title race heats up, El Derbi Madrileño looms on Sunday, and Viktor Hovland fights to climb the Valspar leaderboard after a tough start.
⛳ Valspar Championship — Hovland and Reitan tee off, chasing Sungjae Im's lead at -7. NRK reports Hovland lifted himself after a weak start — can he mount a charge today?

Arsenal sit 9 points clear at the top — but City and Liverpool both play Saturday. A slip from either keeps the title in play. Watch City vs Palace at 16:00 as the day's defining Premier League fixture.
